changes.value:
Wrap EntityCard in a CommandScopeProvider with entity-scoped commands.

Create an InspectContext (React context) in App.tsx exposing `inspectEntity(moniker: string)`. This replaces the `onInspect` prop drilling.

EntityCard (or SortableEntityCard) wraps in:
```tsx
<CommandScopeProvider commands={[
  {
    id: "entity.inspect",
    name: `Inspect ${entity.entity_type}`,
    contextMenu: true,
    execute: () => inspectEntity(moniker(entity.entity_type, entity.id)),
  },
]}>
```

Wire `onContextMenu={useContextMenu()}` on the card's root div.

The (i) button can use `useExecuteCommand()` to fire `entity.inspect` instead of calling `onInspect` directly.

- [ ] Create InspectContext in a new lib/inspect-context.tsx
- [ ] Provide InspectContext in App.tsx (replace onTaskInspect/onColumnInspect prop drilling)
- [ ] Wrap EntityCard in CommandScopeProvider with entity.inspect
- [ ] Wire onContextMenu on EntityCard root div
- [ ] Replace (i) button onClick with scope command execution
- [ ] Remove onInspect prop from EntityCard, SortableEntityCard, ColumnView, BoardView
- [ ] Update tests
- [ ] Run tests

+Wrap EntityCard in a CommandScopeProvider with entity-scoped commands.

Create an InspectContext (React context) in App.tsx exposing `inspectEntity(moniker: string)`. This replaces the `onInspect` prop drilling.

EntityCard (or SortableEntityCard) wraps in:
```tsx
<CommandScopeProvider commands={[
  {
    id: "entity.inspect",
    name: `Inspect ${entity.entity_type}`,
    contextMenu: true,
    execute: () => inspectEntity(moniker(entity.entity_type, entity.id)),
  },
]}>
```

Wire `onContextMenu={useContextMenu()}` on the card's root div.

The (i) button can use `useExecuteCommand()` to fire `entity.inspect` instead of calling `onInspect` directly.

- [ ] Create InspectContext in a new lib/inspect-context.tsx
- [ ] Provide InspectContext in App.tsx (replace onTaskInspect/onColumnInspect prop drilling)
- [ ] Wrap EntityCard in CommandScopeProvider with entity.inspect
- [ ] Wire onContextMenu on EntityCard root div
- [ ] Replace (i) button onClick with scope command execution
- [ ] Remove onInspect prop from EntityCard, SortableEntityCard, ColumnView, BoardView

Tests (inspect-context.test.tsx — new):
- [ ] `useInspect throws outside provider` — verify error message
- [ ] `inspectEntity parses moniker and calls setPanelStack` — mock context, call with "task:abc", verify panel opened

Tests (entity-card.test.tsx — update existing):
- [ ] `right-click calls show_context_menu with entity.inspect` — mock invoke, fire contextmenu event, verify items contain { id: "entity.inspect", name }
- [ ] `(i) button fires entity.inspect command` — render with InspectContext, click (i), verify inspectEntity called with correct moniker
- [ ] `(i) button renders without onInspect prop` — verify button shows when InspectContext is provided (no prop needed)
- [ ] `entity.inspect command has correct moniker` — render card for entity type "task" with id "abc", verify moniker is "task:abc"
- [ ] `no context menu when no contextMenu commands` — render card without scope, right-click doesn't call invoke

Tests (board-view.test.tsx — update existing):
- [ ] `onTaskInspect prop removed` — verify BoardView no longer accepts onTaskInspect
- [ ] `onColumnInspect prop removed` — verify BoardView no longer accepts onColumnInspect
\ No newline at end of file
